articles.title: Zillow forecasts critical mortgage rate change, homebuyer reaction - thestreet.com
articles.description: The real estate technology company reports new research that indicates a massive turn of events in the housing market.
articles.content:
Key Points
  • Mortgage rates have dropped below 6%, boosting affordability and buyer optimism, according to a Zillow analysis.
